title: How Showing Up Before You Feel Ready Builds a Man
caption:
You won't feel ready.

That's the whole point.

Most men are waiting for the right conditions — waiting to feel motivated before they train, called before they lead, prepared before they commit. But readiness isn't a feeling. It's a decision.

God doesn't wait for you to have the sermon polished before He sends you to preach it. He sends you while you're still learning to use your voice. The first try is supposed to be messy. Imperfect action beats perfect inaction.

And here's the thing no one tells you: every time you show up when you don't want to, you build a little more trust in yourself. That trust is what God uses to build something through you.

Obedience doesn't wait for confidence. It builds it.

The man who showed up built the man who was ready.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #masculinity #christianity #growth #scripture
theme: He works — discipline, becoming useful, becoming the kind of man people can count on.
